case_title: LAUDEMA PLEITEZ ET AL VS. ANABELL PINDEDA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-29-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LAUDENIA PLEITEZ & LAUDENIA ZUNIGA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANABELL PINEDA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS SUSAN STRANDGAARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLEITEZ, LAUDENIA ZUNIGA, LAUDENIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PINEDA, ANABELL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,640.00 FILED BY PLEITEZ, LAUDENIA ZUNIGA, LAUDENIA AS TO DEFENDANT PINEDA, ANABELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED FEB-18-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINEDA, ANABELL
